creator: B.Laugraud@student.ulg.ac.be
text:
When I try to launch hald, I have the following error :

"Starting hald
panic: kmem_malloc entry not found or misaligned"

I have a fresh installation and compiled GNOME Yesterday.

Copy of dmesg (for the hardware) :
